2606.13392.title: MiniMax Sparse Attention
2606.13392.paper_summary: Ultra-long-context capability is becoming indispensable for frontier LLMs: agentic workflows, repository-scale code reasoning, and persistent memory all require the model to jointly attend over hundreds of thousands to millions of tokens, yet the quadratic cost of softmax attention makes this untenable at deployment scale. We introduce MiniMax Sparse Attention (MSA), a blockwise sparse attention built upon Grouped Query Attention (GQA). A lightweight Index Branch scores key-value blocks and independently selects a Top-k subset for each GQA group, enabling group-specific sparse retrieval while maintaining efficient block-level execution; the Main Branch then performs exact block-sparse attention over only the selected blocks. Designed around a principle of simplicity and scalability, MSA is deliberately streamlined, making it straightforward to deploy efficiently across a broad range of GPUs. To translate sparsity into practical speedups, we co-design MSA with a GPU execution path that uses exp-free Top-k selection and KV-outer sparse attention to improve tensor-core utilization under block-granular access. On a 109B-parameter model with native multimodal training, MSA performs on par with GQA while reducing per-token attention compute by 28.4x at 1M context. Paired with our co-designed kernel, MSA achieves 14.2x prefill and 7.6x decoding wall-clock speedups on H800. Our inference kernel is available at: https://github.com/MiniMax-AI/MSA. A production-grade natively multimodal model powered by MSA has been publicly released at: https://huggingface.co/MiniMaxAI/MiniMax-M3.
2606.13392.paper_summary_zh: 超長上下文的能力對於前沿的 LLMs 變得不可或缺：代理工作流程、庫規模的代碼推理和持久記憶都要求模型共同關注數十萬到數百萬個標記，但 softmax 注意力的二次成本使得在部署規模上無法承受。我們介紹了 MiniMax 稀疏注意力 (MSA)，這是一種基於分組查詢注意力 (GQA) 的區塊稀疏注意力。輕量級的索引分支對關鍵值區塊進行打分，並獨立選擇每個 GQA 組的 Top-k 子集，實現組特定的稀疏檢索，同時保持高效的區塊級執行；然後主分支僅對選定的區塊執行精確的區塊稀疏注意力。MSA 的設計圍繞簡單性和可擴展性的原則，故意簡化，使其在各種 GPU 上高效部署變得簡單。為了將稀疏性轉化為實際的加速，我們與 GPU 執行路徑共同設計 MSA，該路徑使用無指數的 Top-k 選擇和 KV-外部稀疏注意力，以提高在區塊粒度訪問下的張量核心利用率。在一個擁有 109B 參數的模型上，該模型具有本地多模態訓練，MSA 的性能與 GQA 相當，同時在 1M 上下文下將每標記的注意力計算減少了 28.4 倍。搭配我們共同設計的內核，MSA 在 H800 上實現了 14.2 倍的預填充和 7.6 倍的解碼牆鐘加速。我們的推理內核可在以下網址獲得：https://github.com/MiniMax-AI/MSA。由 MSA 驅動的生產級本地多模態模型已公開發布，網址為：https://huggingface.co/MiniMaxAI/MiniMax-M3。
2606.13392.author: Xunhao Lai et.al.
2606.13392.authors: Xunhao Lai, Weiqi Xu, Yufeng Yang, Qiaorui Chen, Yang Xu, Lunbin Zeng, Xiaolong Li, Haohai Sun, Haichao Zhu, Vito Zhang, Pengyu Zhao
